body:
This PR adds a frontend-only XP, level, and rank system to the Lobby user card.

The system calculates progression from existing user stats:
- totalGames
- totalWins
- winRate
- maxDamage

Changes include:
- Add pure XP calculation helpers in `xpSystem.js`
- Display dynamic Level, Rank title, XP text, and progress bar
- Use an RPG-style level curve so early levels progress faster and later levels require more XP
- Keep Wins / Games / Win % stats unchanged
- Add safe fallback values when stats are missing or unavailable
- Preserve existing Lobby layout and responsive behavior

No backend, database schema, API, socket, or gameplay logic changes were made.

Verified with `npm run build`.

这个 PR 为 Lobby 左侧用户卡片新增了一个纯前端 XP、等级和 Rank 成长系统。

系统基于现有真实用户数据计算成长进度：
- totalGames
- totalWins
- winRate
- maxDamage

改动包括：
- 新增 `xpSystem.js` 纯函数工具，用于 XP 和等级计算
- 动态显示 Level、Rank Title、XP 数值和 Progress Bar
- 使用 RPG 风格等级曲线，使前期升级更快、后期升级逐渐变慢
- 保持 Wins / Games / Win % 原有统计逻辑不变
- 当 stats 缺失或未加载时提供安全 fallback 默认值
- 保持现有 Lobby 布局与响应式行为稳定

本次改动未修改：
- backend
- Mongo schema
- API
- socket
- PvE / Rogue gameplay logic

已通过 `npm run build` 本地验证。
title: feat(lobby): add frontend XP and rank system
